headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://maps.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://*.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://maps.gstatic.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.google.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.analytics.google.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://www.gstatic.com; frame-src 'none'
